name: Unit Testing Business Logic
description: Test individual functions and classes in isolation with mocked dependencies.
when_to_use: Always; for all ViewModel; UseCase; Repository; and utility logic.
trade_offs: Cannot catch integration issues; requires good dependency injection setup.
implementation_notes: Android: JUnit5 + MockK + Turbine (for Flow). iOS: XCTest + Swift Testing. KMM: kotlin.test + Turbine.
keywords: unit test junit mockk xctest turbine

name: UI / Instrumentation Tests
description: Verify UI rendering and interaction on real or emulated devices.
when_to_use: For critical user flows (login; checkout; onboarding) and regression prevention.
trade_offs: Slow execution; flaky on CI without proper wait strategies.
implementation_notes: Android: Compose UI Test (ComposeTestRule). iOS: XCUITest. Flutter: integration_test. Espresso for View-based.
keywords: ui test compose espresso xcuitest instrumentation

name: Screenshot / Snapshot Testing
description: Capture and compare UI screenshots to detect unintended visual changes.
when_to_use: When maintaining design consistency across releases and themes (dark mode).
trade_offs: Pixel-perfect comparison breaks with font rendering differences across OS versions.
implementation_notes: Android: Paparazzi or Roborazzi (no device needed). iOS: swift-snapshot-testing. Compose: Screenshot Testing lib.
keywords: screenshot snapshot visual regression paparazzi roborazzi

name: Integration / E2E Tests
description: Test full user flows across multiple screens and layers without mocking.
when_to_use: For smoke tests of critical business flows before each release.
trade_offs: Slow; flaky; require test server or mock API. Run on CI only.
implementation_notes: Android: Espresso + Hilt test + MockWebServer. iOS: XCUITest + stub server. Flutter: integration_test.
keywords: integration e2e end to end flow test

name: ViewModel Unit Testing
description: Test ViewModel state emissions and side effects with controlled inputs.
when_to_use: For every ViewModel to verify state transitions and error handling.
trade_offs: Requires Dispatchers.setMain for coroutine testing; lifecycle simulation.
implementation_notes: Android: runTest + Turbine + TestDispatcher. iOS: async/await test + Combine expectations.
keywords: viewmodel test turbine runtest dispatcher stateflow

name: Repository / Data Layer Testing
description: Test data layer with fake data sources to verify caching and error handling.
when_to_use: When verifying offline behavior; cache strategies; and API error mapping.
trade_offs: Must maintain fake implementations in sync with real ones.
implementation_notes: Use fake implementations (not mocks) for data sources. Test cache-hit and cache-miss paths separately.

name: Accessibility Testing
description: Verify touch targets; content descriptions; screen reader compatibility.
when_to_use: For all public-facing apps; required for government and enterprise apps.
trade_offs: Automated tools catch ~30% of issues; manual screen reader testing needed.
implementation_notes: Android: Accessibility Scanner + Compose semantics. iOS: Accessibility Inspector + VoiceOver. axe-android.
keywords: accessibility a11y voiceover talkback content description

name: Performance / Benchmark Testing
description: Measure startup time; frame rendering; and operation latency in CI.
when_to_use: When tracking performance regressions across releases.
trade_offs: Benchmark results vary by device; use consistent CI hardware.
implementation_notes: Android: Macrobenchmark (startup; frames; traces). iOS: XCTest measure blocks + MetricKit. Firebase Performance.

name: Network / API Contract Testing
description: Verify API response parsing and error handling with recorded or mock responses.
when_to_use: When app depends on backend APIs that can change contract unexpectedly.
trade_offs: Recorded responses can become stale; use contract testing for critical APIs.
implementation_notes: Android: MockWebServer + OkHttp interceptor. iOS: URLProtocol mock. KMM: ktor MockEngine.
keywords: network api mock contract test mockwebserver

name: Memory Leak Detection Tests
description: Automatically detect retained objects and memory leaks during test runs.
when_to_use: When investigating OOM crashes or as part of CI quality gates.
trade_offs: LeakCanary adds overhead; run in dedicated test suite not with unit tests.
implementation_notes: Android: LeakCanary + LeakAssertions in tests. iOS: Instruments Leaks template. Check for retained ViewModels.
keywords: leak memory detection leakcanary retained test

name: Concurrency / Race Condition Tests
description: Verify thread safety of shared mutable state and async operations.
when_to_use: When multiple coroutines or threads access shared state simultaneously.
trade_offs: Non-deterministic failures; use stress tests with repeated iterations.
implementation_notes: Kotlin: runTest with multiple coroutines. Swift: Actor isolation tests. Use AtomicInteger or Mutex for shared state.
keywords: concurrency race condition thread safety test async

name: Compose Preview Screenshot Tests
description: Use Compose Previews as snapshot test sources for rapid visual regression.
when_to_use: When using Jetpack Compose and want fast visual tests without devices.
trade_offs: Only tests Compose UI; not platform-specific rendering.
implementation_notes: Android: Compose Preview Screenshot Testing (official) or Showkase + Paparazzi for all previews.
keywords: compose preview screenshot showkase snapshot test
